source: Generated from Commander definitions by scripts/generate-capabilities.mjs. Do not hand-edit.

cli.name: pixverse
cli.description: PixVerse CLI - generate videos and images from the command line

contract.auth: OAuth device flow with a local CLI session
contract.json: Use --json or -p for pure JSON stdout; errors and progress go to stderr.
contract.text_inputs: prompt, text, lyrics accept literal text, local file path, or - for stdin.

exit_codes.1: GENERAL_ERROR: general API or unexpected error
exit_codes.3: AUTH_EXPIRED: authentication token invalid or expired
exit_codes.5: GENERATION_FAILED: generation failed or was not approved

global_options.-p: Print mode - pure JSON output (alias for --json)
global_options.--workspace-id <id>: Override active workspace for this command (0 = personal)
global_options.--trace-id <id>: Trace ID to attach to all API requests in this invocation (must be UUIDv4)

commands.desc: PixVerse CLI - generate videos and images from the command line

options.-p: Print mode - pure JSON output (alias for --json)
options.--workspace-id <id>: Override active workspace for this command (0 = personal)
options.--trace-id <id>: Trace ID to attach to all API requests in this invocation (must be UUIDv4)

commands.desc: Login via browser authorization (OAuth device flow)
Check authentication status and account info

options.--prompt <text>: Prompt text - literal, a local file path, or - for stdin (required)
options.--image <input>: Image input: file path, HTTPS URL, image ID, or media path (local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--prompt <text>: Prompt text - literal, a local file path, or - for stdin (required)
options.--image <input>: Single image input: file path, HTTPS URL, image ID, or media path (local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--images <inputs...>: Multiple image inputs: file paths, HTTPS URLs, image IDs, or media paths (local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--detail-level <level>: Detail level for gpt-image-2.0: low | medium | high
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--images <inputs...>: Image inputs: file paths, HTTPS URLs, image IDs, or media paths (2+ required; local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--text <str>: Text to synthesize - literal, a local file path, or - for stdin
options.--no-use-speaker-boost: Disable ElevenLabs speaker boost | negates: useSpeakerBoost
options.--output <path>: Download the finished audio to this file/dir
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

commands.desc: Generate music audio from a prompt

options.--prompt <text>: Music prompt - literal, a local file path, or - for stdin (required)
options.--lyrics <text>: Lyrics for models that support lyrics - literal, a local file path, or - for stdin
options.--no-duration-auto: Disable automatic duration selection | negates: durationAuto
options.--image <input...>: Reference image(s) for Google Lyria: file path, HTTPS URL, image ID, or media path
options.--output <path>: Download the finished music to this file/dir
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--video <input>: Video input: file path, HTTPS URL, video ID, or media path
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--video <input>: Video input: file path, HTTPS URL, video ID, or media path
options.--prompt <text>: Prompt describing the modification. Reference uploaded images with @image1, @image2, ... (1-indexed, matches --images order)
options.--images <inputs...>: Reference image inputs (max 5): file paths, HTTPS URLs, image IDs, or media paths. Reference them in --prompt as @image1, @image2, ...
options.--keyframe-time <ms>: Keyframe time in milliseconds (0 = first frame) | default: 0
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--video <input>: Video input: file path, HTTPS URL, video ID, or media path
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--images <inputs...>: Image inputs: file paths, HTTPS URLs, image IDs, or media paths (1–7, up to 9 for seedance-2.0; local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--videos <inputs...>: Video reference inputs (seedance-2.0 only): file paths, HTTPS URLs, video IDs, or media paths (max 3, total duration ≤ 15s)
options.--audios <inputs...>: Audio reference inputs (seedance-2.0 only): file paths, HTTPS URLs, audio IDs, or media paths (max 3, each 2–15s, total ≤ 15s; requires at least one image or video reference)
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

commands.desc: Generate video with character image + motion reference video

options.--image <input>: Character image: file path, HTTPS URL, image ID, or media path (required; local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--video <input>: Motion reference video: file path, HTTPS URL, video ID, or media path (required)
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

options.--image <paths...>: Image input(s): file paths, HTTPS URLs, image IDs, or media paths (local oversized images are auto-resized to fit 1920x1920)
options.--video <input>: Video input: file path, HTTPS URL, video ID, or media path
options.--idempotency-key <key>: Idempotency key for safe retry - backend dedupes by key so repeated submissions return the original task without re-charging
options.--no-wait: Return immediately without polling | negates: wait

commands.desc: Check the status of one or more generation tasks

args.id?: Single video, image, or audio ID (omit when using --ids)

options.--ids <ids>: Comma-separated list of IDs for batch query (e.g. 123,456,789)
options.--type <type>: Asset type: video, image, or audio | default: video

commands.desc: Wait for a generation task to complete

options.--type <type>: Asset type: video, image, or audio | default: video
Asset type: video, image, or audio | default: video | choices: video, image, audio
options.--source <source>: Asset source: create or upload | default: create | choices: create, upload
options.--off-peak: Filter off-peak generations only (video + create only)
options.--limit <number>: Number of items per page | default: 20

commands.desc: Get details of a specific asset

options.--type <type>: Asset type: video, image, or audio (auto-detected if omitted)
options.--source <source>: Audio source: create or upload | default: create | choices: create, upload

commands.desc: Download a created video, image, or audio to local disk

args.id: Created video, image, or audio ID (uploads not downloadable)

options.--type <type>: Asset type: video, image, or audio (auto-detected if omitted)

commands.desc: Upload a local file or HTTPS URL to asset library

args.input: Local file path or HTTPS URL (jpg/png/webp/mp4/mov/mp3/wav/m4a/aac/ogg)

commands.desc: Delete a video, image, or audio asset

options.--type <type>: Asset type: video, image, or audio (auto-detected if omitted) | choices: video, image, audio
options.--source <source>: Asset source: create or upload | default: create | choices: create, upload

commands.desc: View account info and credit usage
Show account info, workspace, and credit balance

options.--type <type>: Filter: all, earned, used (personal only) | default: all
options.--limit <n>: Number of records to show | default: 20

commands.desc: Show current concurrent generation slots (image / video)
Open the PixVerse subscription page in your browser
Show creation defaults (all modes or a specific mode)
Reset creation defaults to built-in values

options.--limit <number>: Number of items per page | default: 20

commands.desc: Browse voice/TTS models and preset voices
List available voice providers, models, and languages
List available music providers and models
Manage saved folders and their contents

args.folder_id?: Folder ID (default: default folder) | default: default

options.--source <source>: Asset source: create or upload | default: create | choices: create, upload
options.--limit <number>: Number of items per page | default: 20

commands.desc: Add assets to a saved folder

options.--folder <folder_id>: Folder ID (default: default folder) | default: default
options.--type <type>: Asset type: video or image | choices: video, image
options.--source <source>: Asset source: create or upload | default: create | choices: create, upload

commands.desc: Remove assets from a saved folder

options.--folder <folder_id>: Folder ID (default: default folder) | default: default
options.--type <type>: Asset type: video or image | choices: video, image
options.--source <source>: Asset source: create or upload | default: create | choices: create, upload
